name: SIN - Whispers Of Guilt
overview: A story of an ex-police officer Samar Saxena (played by Sahidur Rahman) seeks redemption after a tragic mishap fractures friendships and shatters lives.

trailers.title: SIN Official Teaser |Tridha C ,Md.Sahidur R,Pratik D |Arunava Khasnobis| December 22nd | Addatimes
